reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability review run from cmd/sworn/maintainability_freshness_test.go:TestMaintainabilityFreshnessBinaryReachability reaches C-08 and then fails closed at the next unavailable gate
release_benefit: Sworn can distinguish current verified evidence from stale or historical ownership after track synchronization.

design_decisions.choice: Revalidate C-08 active/retired ownership on the public command path before any report reuse or dispatch and keep invalidation mutation-free here.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 Coach instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: use pathwise C-08 authority before reuse or dispatch.
design_decisions.rationale: Disjoint sibling work remains valid while stale overlap is detected without letting this primitive mutate lifecycle state.

design_decisions.choice: Bind historical bootstrap recognition to each sealed entry's exact consumer slice, immutable start, exact review head, first-parent interval, and freshness purpose; never activate the manifest globally.
options: treat the manifest as global merge authority
recognize exact authorized interval entries only
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's standing instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: preserve S01/S02 freshness evidence through exact authorization-bound recognition.
design_decisions.rationale: Freshness can reproduce existing immutable evidence without making the same merge valid for another slice, endpoint, purpose, or future custom merge.

positive_scenarios: Disjoint authoritative intervals survive recognized synchronization, while an intersecting sync disjoint from later authority yields one exact mutation-free local invalidation plan.
An S01/S02 interval may consume only entries matching its exact slice, start, review head, first-parent endpoints, freshness purpose, schema, and digest while planning authority.
negative_scenarios: Later overlap, shipped authority, or non-canonical synchronization emits no transition plan and cannot preserve stale PASS evidence or authorize automatic rollback.
A wrong-slice, outside-endpoint, wrong-purpose, mismatched, unlisted, pre-start, future, globally activated, or caller-selected historical entry blocks without mutation.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Explicit interval and provenance authority prevents a green board from hiding code that changed after review.
